calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MARY G. SANCIMINO, FOR THE PETITIONER;

ATTY. SANCIMINO REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THE ADMINISTRATOR IS AN ELDERLY WOMAN WHO LIVES IN FLORIDA AND COUNSEL HAS BEEN ASSISTING HER TO PERFORM SERVICES. THE FEES SOUGHT ARE REASONABLE AND THE ESTATE HAS BENEFITED. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATH BERSAMIN, CSR, 1172; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Continued To Dec-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Continued To Nov-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Sancimino appeared for Ann Elliott (Administrator).

Ms. Sancimino reported that the request for the Income Tax Certificate had been lost, and that she had to resubmit it. She requested a continuance and stated that the issues raised by the Examiner will addressed in the Supplemental Declaration. Counsel submitted a revised Order. The matter was continued to November 28, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
